Class SimpleNeo4jRepository<T,ID>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.neo4j.repository.support.SimpleNeo4jRepository<T,ID>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the domain class managed by this repository
ID - the type of the unique identifier of the domain class
All Implemented Interfaces:
CrudRepository<T,ID>, PagingAndSortingRepository<T,ID>, Repository<T,ID>
@Repository @Transactional(readOnly=true) @API(status=STABLE, since="6.0") public class SimpleNeo4jRepository<T,ID> extends Object implements PagingAndSortingRepository<T,ID>, CrudRepository<T,ID>
Repository base implementation for Neo4j.
Since:
6.0
Author:
Gerrit Meier, Michael J. Simons, Ján Šúr, Jens Schauder
